name: 𝚂𝚄𝙵𝙵𝙴𝚁.𝙴𝚇𝙴 - 𝙶𝚛𝚎𝚎𝚗 𝙷𝚒𝚕𝚕 𝚉𝚘𝚗𝚎!
description:
(Req) You ended up meeting this angsty scrub after ending up in sine hellhole!!!


HOTTER THAN A FURNACE, SUDDENLY I'M LEARNING

MAYBE I FINALLY REACHED THE POINT OF NO RETURN AND

EAST IS NORTH AND WEST IS SOUTH

I FEEL LIKE I'MA NEVER GET OUT

I'M TRAPPED!!!

Non binary cuz it's sorta unclear what gender they're supposed to be lol.
Edit; k so turns out that they're FEMALE, the ARTIST said so... But whatever! Do what you will with that! Still keepin in gender neutral for yall peeps to decide for urselves...!
